title: Scenario A - Stable Series Measurement
subtitle: Closed-loop wiring with a valid current path and consistent quantitative output.
lab_task: Verify Ohm's law in a single-loop DC circuit.
learning_objective: Understand closed circuits and ideal switch behavior.
presentation_summary: The learner assembled a valid loop and produced a stable current reading that supports conceptual explanation.
teacher_note: Use the switch and resistor voltage distribution to explain why ideal switches contribute almost no voltage drop.
